earning_rates.notes: 3x on Apple products, apps, subscriptions, and services purchased directly from Apple
2x on all other purchases (except cash back category)

other_benefits.name: Daily Cash
other_benefits.description: Instant cash back (not points) deposited daily to your Apple Cash card

other_benefits.name: No Fees
other_benefits.description: No annual fees, no late fees, no foreign transaction fees, no penalty APR

other_benefits.name: Apple Pay Integration
other_benefits.description: Seamless integration with Apple Pay for secure mobile payments

other_benefits.name: Titanium Card
other_benefits.description: Physical titanium credit card with no card number embossed (for use where Apple Pay is not accepted)
